payload.subject: Able.cz s.r.o.
payload.scope: Public-evidence due diligence. Not a full transaction due diligence: no data room, management Q&A, contracts, bank records, tax files, or source-code access were available.

payload.text: 150+ in-house AI agents
300% average client-side ROI
Hundreds of man-days saved
Delivery in weeks, not months
>90% reduction in error rate
600% ROI (Arkadia Labs case)
3,500 person-days saved (AAA Auto case)
50% faster process (AAA Auto case)
Client data never used to train external LLMs
AI agents run in an isolated environment
Code remains under client control
NDA and DPA signed on every project
Data never leaves the EU
payload.note: The GDPR page (SRC-01) states no intent to transfer personal data to third countries, which is consistent but is itself a company statement, not independent proof.

payload.text: Acquired 100% of product studio Blackfish; founder Vít Schlesinger stayed to lead business strategy
payload.note: Reported consistently by two independent media outlets.

payload.text: Named clients incl. AAA Auto, Aures Holdings, Arkadia, Encall, Taste Town
payload.note: Published by Able; a named client is evidence of a stated relationship, not of the quantified result.

payload.resolution: The public register value (C 85425) is the authoritative one. The value on the company's own legal page (C 85424) is most plausibly a transcription error or a stale copy. This is recorded, not silently normalized.

payload.label: AAA Auto
payload.summary: Named client; relationship stated by Able, quantified result not independently verified.

payload.label: Able.cz s.r.o.
payload.summary: Brno software company, the subject of this review. Incorporated 3 Oct 2012.

payload.label: Arkadia
payload.summary: Named client; 600% ROI case is self-reported.

payload.label: Aures Holdings
payload.summary: Named client (self-reported).

payload.label: Blackfish
payload.summary: Product studio; Able acquired 100% in 2025 (two-outlet corroboration).

payload.label: able.cz
payload.summary: Company website; seat and identity on it match the register.

payload.label: Encall
payload.summary: Named client (self-reported).

payload.label: V. Faraga

ident.role: jednatel (statutory officer) + shareholder; markets as CEO

payload.summary: Co-founder; registered statutory officer since incorporation.

payload.label: 5326G s.r.o.
payload.summary: Register shareholder (minority stake).

payload.label: L. Grolig
payload.summary: Marketed as CTO; not found in the register statutory body or shareholder list.

payload.label: Google Workspace (email)
payload.summary: able.cz mail routes to Google (MX smtp.google.com) — Google Workspace.

payload.label: Websupport (DNS/hosting)
payload.summary: able.cz nameservers and A records resolve to Websupport infrastructure (measured 2026-07-17).

payload.label: R. Juhaňák
payload.summary: Register shareholder; marketed as CSO — statutory status not confirmed.

payload.label: Krajský soud v Brně
payload.summary: Registration court. The register file (C 85425) contradicts the company GDPR page (C 85424).

payload.label: T. Melichárek
payload.summary: Registered statutory officer since incorporation.

payload.label: Point FM (M. Kříž)
payload.summary: Media-reported 2023 investor; ~5% stake. Self-reported, single-outlet.

payload.label: L. Polanský
payload.summary: Registered to the supervisory board on 13 Oct 2020.

payload.label: V. Schlesinger
payload.summary: Founder of Blackfish; stayed to lead business strategy after the acquisition.

payload.label: Taste Town
payload.summary: Named client (self-reported).

payload.label: Let's Encrypt (TLS)

ident.note: an Amazon-issued certificate is also present in CT logs

payload.summary: Current able.cz TLS certificates are issued by Let's Encrypt; an Amazon-issued certificate is also present in certificate-transparency logs.

payload.label: ZenX Capital a.s.
payload.summary: Register shareholder (investment vehicle linked to Zdeněk Sluka in media).

payload.metric: Combined contract value of those tenders
Combined revenue target (Able + Blackfish, stated year)
payload.note: A forward-looking target attributed to Vít Schlesinger in media, not a filed result.

payload.metric: Tenders won in the stated year (combined)

rule.text: A statutory officer acts independently, except for acts of property management or monetary obligations above 200,000 CZK (excl. VAT), which require all statutory officers to act jointly.

payload.value: Krajský soud v Brně (Regional Court in Brno)

payload.name: Lukáš Grolig
payload.corroboration: Not found in the register statutory body or shareholder list in this pass — a marketing role, not a verified statutory office.

payload.name: Radek Juhaňák
payload.corroboration: Shareholder per register (SRC-03); statutory status not confirmed.

payload.name: Václav Faraga
payload.corroboration: Also confirmed via LinkedIn (SRC-06) and as a statutory officer (SRC-03).

payload.text: Whether the marketing roles CTO (Grolig) and CSO (Juhaňák) correspond to any current statutory function.
Current combined headcount and revenue as filed, versus the self-reported target.
Filed financial statements (revenue, result, assets, headcount) — available at justice.cz Sbírka listin, not retrieved in this pass.
Public-sector contracts and any EU-cofinanced project details (Hlídač státu and grant registers not retrieved here).
Independent client confirmation of the quantified case-study results (ROI, person-days).
